title: genista pumila subsp. elias-sennenii
intro: Genista pumila subsp. elias-sennenii, also known as dwarf broom, is a perennial shrub in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Genista pumila subsp. elias-sennenii is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
